summary: The Goshen Township Board of Trustees held their regular meeting covering a wide range of topics including a presentation by an Eagle Scout candidate for a flag retirement box, updates on commercial development along State Route 28, a detailed discussion of the Appalachian Community Grant Program ($500 million state program), and presentation and approval of the 2023 township budget. The board also canceled the December 20 meeting, approved credit card authorization changes, promoted Alyssa Hundley to zoning inspector, and discussed plans for a digital sign and ongoing infrastructure projects.
decisions: Motion to adopt the agenda passed unanimously
Motion to approve payment of bills (Oct 25 - Nov 7, 2022) passed unanimously
Motion to allow Eagle Scout flag retirement box to be built inside the administrative building passed unanimously
Motion to cancel the December 20, 2022 regular board of trustees meeting passed unanimously
Motion to remove Steve Pegram and Cheryl Allgaier and add Alyssa Hundley and Michaela Young as authorized credit card users passed unanimously
Motion to direct Administrator Rose to attend Sunshine Law certified training on behalf of elected officials passed unanimously
Motion to approve FOP extension agreement waiving ORC 4117.14G11 provisions retroactive to January 1, 2023 passed unanimously
Motion to adjourn into executive session at 7:48 PM passed unanimously
Motion to approve the 2023 adopted budget as presented passed unanimously
Motion to promote Alyssa Hundley to zoning inspector effective November 20, 2022 at $22/hour with six-month probation passed unanimously

Dan and Harry to work with prosecutor Julia on clarifying dedicated right-of-way vs dedicated road for private drives

attendees: Trustee Hauserman (also referred to as Halderman)
Steve Pegram (former Chief, removed from credit card)
notes: The transcript has significant audio quality issues in the latter portions, particularly during the fire department budget presentation, with repeated and garbled text. Some trustee names appear inconsistent - 'Hauserman' and 'Halderman' seem to be used interchangeably, and 'Bob Haldeman' appears to serve dual roles as trustee and participant. The roll call at adjournment erroneously includes names (Lindstrom, Malauulu, Gatto, Nielsen, Abboud) that are not Goshen Township trustees, likely a transcription error. The executive session lasted from 7:48 PM to 8:39 PM. Election Day was referenced as it was November 8, 2022.
title: BOT 11-8-22.mp4
